title: Router pseudocode loop defect
summary: SKILL.md iterates `for keyword, weight in cfg["keywords"]` even though keywords is a string list; the executable form should iterate keywords and add cfg.weight.

title: Shared register missing from parseable routing
summary: Loading levels require ../shared/register.md, but RESOURCE_MAP and router replay outputs omit it; _guard_in_skill would reject a parent path without a deliberate exception.
